prompt: Security camera monitoring dashboard with military-inspired dark interface, green LED status indicators, multiple video feeds arranged in a grid, and motion detection overlays with geometric highlights
prompt_refined: A high-tech security camera monitoring dashboard, rendered with a sleek, dark, military-inspired interface. Multiple live video feeds are prominently displayed, meticulously arranged in a clean, structured grid pattern across the main screen. Each individual video feed features active motion detection overlays, appearing as bright, precise geometric highlights (e.g., dynamic bounding boxes, sharp polygonal outlines) directly superimposed onto the surveillance footage. Subtle, vibrant green LED status indicators are strategically integrated into the dark paneling, surrounding the video feeds and along the bottom or top edges of the dashboard.
objects: Live video feeds arranged in a clean, structured grid pattern
Active motion detection overlays on video feeds
Bright, precise geometric highlights (e.g., bounding boxes, polygonal outlines)
Subtle, vibrant green LED status indicators
Green LED indicators surrounding video feeds and along bottom/top edges
